action.description: Use chemotherapy with or without targeted therapy, or endocrine therapy when HR-positive, to reduce the extent of local therapy.

documentation.citation: Neoadjuvant systemic therapy may be used to reduce the extent of surgery, including increasing breast-conserving options.
